name: x402-2357-shared-fixture
notes: Three-way interop vector from x402-foundation/x402#2357. Shared payment_hash and action_ref bind Axis 1 (seritalien/zkpay STARK), Axis 2 (feedoracle hybrid-PQC ES256K+ML-DSA-65), and Axis 3 (this harness). Uses timestamp_ms (epoch integer) per the original #2332 preimage spec. JCS canonicalization (RFC 8785) produces identical bytes across Node.js, Python, and Rust runtimes.
